rule_text: For cooking or garden purchases, she prefers heirloom and fresh-herb options over plainer generic alternatives.

rule_text: When a purchased item is wrong for her cooking, quilting, or event work, she prefers an exchange over a refund.
canonical_answer: If something I bought isn’t right, I’d rather swap it for the right thing than just get my money back.
counterfactual_default: Choose a refund as the standard return outcome.

evidence.content: Quilting and crochet
